sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try arrangement: f4469c, fb80c9, cddd7d, b4edb3, f4469c
# Current: cddd7d(1), fb80c9(0), b4edb3(2), f4469c(1), cddd7d(0)
# Target: f4469c(4), fb80c9(0), cddd7d(3), b4edb3(4), f4469c(3)
# Cursor at pos 43

cycles = {
    15: ['b4edb3fa', 'cddd7d2c', '6610c6e3', '8b720570', 'f4469c24', '04a8e75f', 'a2774f59'],
    22: ['fb80c9b2', 'c66a83c4', '4d73d8e8', 'f374da0b', '9f50b4b5', '886b69a2', '3ad806a3'],
    29: ['5fcaa599', '6f89cc49', 'b4edb3fa', 'cddd7d2c', '2c0adb75', '2c1efde5', 'f4469c24'],
    36: ['8b720570', 'f4469c24', '04a8e75f', 'a2774f59', 'b4edb3fa', 'cddd7d2c', '6610c6e3'],
    43: ['cddd7d2c', '6610c6e3', '8b720570', 'f4469c24', '04a8e75f', 'a2774f59', 'b4edb3fa'],
}

current = {15: 1, 22: 0, 29: 2, 36: 1, 43: 0}
target = {15: 4, 22: 0, 29: 3, 36: 4, 43: 3}  # f4469c, fb80c9, cddd7d, b4edb3, f4469c

actions = ['LEFT'] * 4  # 43 -> 15
for col in [15, 22, 29, 36, 43]:
    ups = (target[col] - current[col]) % 7
    actions.extend(['UP'] * ups)
    if col != 43:
        actions.append('RIGHT')

print(f"Actions: {len(actions)} total")
predict(expect_change=True, note="Try f4469c, fb80c9, cddd7d, b4edb3, f4469c")
action(actions)

seg = current_frame.segmentation
pink = {}
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'B':
        br = n['boundary']
        if br:
            min_r = min(p[0] for p in br)
            min_c = min(p[1] for p in br)
            if min_r == 52:
                pink[min_c] = n['hash']
print("Pink:", {k: v[:8] for k, v in sorted(pink.items())})
print("Done?", last_action_result.get('done'), "Level?", last_action_result.get('level_completed'))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
